reviews.comment:
Muy bueno el lugar pero estaria bueno que las cajeras que atendieran sepan hablar ingles, estan en acceso paramericana y muchas personas pasan. Habia unos extranjeros q le pedian cosas y las chicas les hablaba en español creyendo q los entenderian los clientes,es mas q nada para mejor comunicacion

(Translated by Google)
The place is great, but it would be good if the cashiers spoke English. They're located on the Pan-American Highway access road, and many people pass by. There were some foreigners asking for things, and the cashiers spoke to them in Spanish, thinking the customers would understand. It's mainly for better communication.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ1b1lUbU5nEAE
